message:
Add explicit staging step for ghcommit-action

The action doesn't detect new untracked files without git add.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -47,6 +47,9 @@ jobs:
           mkdir -p "${{ inputs.project }}"
           rsync -av --delete "/tmp/source/${{ inputs.path }}/" "${{ inputs.project }}/"
 
+      - name: Stage changes
+        run: git add .
+
       - name: Generate app token
         id: app-token
         uses: actions/create-github-app-token@v1
